title: Explore District 01: City Map and Walking Features Live!
summary: Dive into District 01 with our latest updates! We've enhanced the CityMap and CityScene components, adding mobile shell visibility management and improved walking interactions. Explore the new cyberpunk city!
core_message: The CityMap and CityScene components have been updated with enhanced scene management and mobile shell visibility. Users can now experience improved walking interactions within District 01, bringing the cyberpunk aesthetic to life.

linkedin.text:
CodeGrind Update: Explore District 01 with Enhanced City Map and Walking Features!

We've significantly updated the CityMap and CityScene components, introducing mobile shell visibility management and refining walking interactions. These enhancements bring the cyberpunk aesthetic of District 01 to life, offering a more immersive experience.

Key improvements include:
- Enhanced scene management for CityMap and CityScene.
- Improved mobile shell visibility.
- More intuitive walking interactions.

Dive into the detailed cyberpunk world of District 01 and discover the latest advancements. Explore District 01 on CodeGrind now!

Learn more: https://codegrind.online

reddit_subreddit.title: CodeGrind: Explore District 01 - New City Map & Walking Features Live!
reddit_subreddit.text:
We're excited to announce the latest updates for District 01 on CodeGrind! Our CityMap and CityScene components have been enhanced with improved scene management and mobile shell visibility. Experience more fluid walking interactions as you explore the detailed cyberpunk city.

This update focuses on bringing the world of District 01 to life with better environmental interaction and visual clarity.

Come explore the enhanced District 01 on CodeGrind today!

[https://codegrind.online](https://codegrind.online)

Explore District 01 on CodeGrind!

Discover the detailed world of District 01 with these new features:
